title.en: Fire! It's awesome! 끝내준다! 최고다! 완전 대박!!

description.en: When you see something amazing or eat delicious food! Practice expressing your greatest admiration with 끝내준다 and 완전 대박.
description.ko: 정말 멋진 것을 보거나 아주 맛있는 음식을 먹었을 때! 끝내준다와 완전 대박을 사용해 최고의 감탄을 표현해 봅니다.

tags: Reaction. Admiration. Slang. Excitement. Positive. Daily Life

content.speaker: John
content.text: What's up world! Welcome back. You are listening to... "Real Reaction!" I'm your host. John.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Mina. you have to see this! I just watched the new music video from that rookie group.

content.speaker: John
content.text: The choreography. the beat... everything is fire! 진짜 끝내주더라고요!
content.translation: The choreography. the beat... everything is fire! It was really awesome!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 저도 방금 봤는데 진짜 완전 대박 이네요!
content.translation: Wow. I just watched it too and it's really awesome!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 군무가 딱딱 맞는 게 정말 최고예요. 눈을 뗄 수가 없네요!
content.translation: The group dance is perfectly synchronized. so it's really the best. I can't take my eyes off it!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 끝내준다. This sounds like something is so good it "ends" everything. right.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 맞아요. 너무 훌륭해서 더 이상 말이 필요 없을 때 쓰는 표현이에요.
content.translation: Right. It's an expression used when something is so great that no more words are needed.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 실력이나 경치 그리고 음식 맛이 아주 좋을 때. "진짜 끝내준다!" 라고 감탄하곤 하죠.
content.translation: When skills. scenery. or food tastes are very good. we often exclaim. "It's really awesome!"

content.speaker: John
content.text: 끝내준다.

content.speaker: John
content.text: How about 완전 대박.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 대박은 원래 큰 행운이나 성공을 뜻하는 말이었어요.
content.translation: Daebak originally meant great luck or success.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 지금은 정말 놀랍거나 멋진 상황에서 "대박!" 혹은 "완전 대박!"이라고 아주 많이 써요.
content.translation: Now. it's used a lot as "Daebak!" or "Wan-jeon Daebak!" in truly amazing or cool situations.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 완전 대박.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Okay. let's try a situation. Imagine I just took you to a hidden rooftop cafe with an amazing view of the city.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 존! 여기 뷰가 정말 장난 아니네요.
content.translation: Wow. John! The view here is really no joke.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 서울 시내가 한눈에 다 보여요. 진짜 끝내주네요!
content.translation: You can see all of downtown Seoul at a glance. It's really awesome!

content.speaker: John
content.text: I knew you would like it. This spot is fire. right?

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 네! 분위기가 정말 최고예요.
content.translation: Yes! The atmosphere is really the best.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 이런 곳을 어떻게 찾아냈어요? 완전 대박!
content.translation: How did you find a place like this? John. you're totally awesome!

content.speaker: John
content.text: I have my ways. Mina. Let's enjoy the coffee and the view!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Using energetic reactions makes the moment even more special.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 맞아요. 좋은 것을 보고 아낌없이 감탄하는 마음이 상대방도 기분 좋게 만들거든요.
content.translation: Right. The heart that admires something good without hesitation makes the other person feel good too.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 오늘 배운 파이팅 넘치는 표현들로 여러분의 기분을 마음껏 표현해 보세요!
content.translation: Express your feelings to your heart's content with the energetic expressions we learned today!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Let's review our "awesome" reactions one last time.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 끝내준다! It's awesome!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 최고다! It's the best!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 완전 대박! That's incredible!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 진짜 장난 아니다! This is no joke!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 장난 아니네! That's amazing!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 여러분도 오늘 기분 최고인 일들이 가득한 대박 같은 하루 보내시길 바랄게요.
content.translation: I hope you all have an awesome day today full of things that make you feel the best.

content.speaker: John
content.text: That's all for today. See you in the next episode.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 다음에 또 만나요. 안녕~!
content.translation: See you again next time. Bye~!

vocabulary.meaning: To be awesome. To be amazing
vocabulary.example: 오늘 날씨 정말 끝내주네요! (The weather today is really awesome!)
당신이 내 인생의 최고예요. (You are the best in my life.)
이번 영화 진짜 대박 날 것 같아요. (I think this movie will be a huge hit.)
아름다운 풍경에 감탄이 절로 나와요. (Admiration comes out naturally at the beautiful scenery.)
이 카페는 분위기가 정말 좋네요. (This cafe has a really good atmosphere.)

vocabulary.meaning: To be no joke. To be incredible
vocabulary.example: 그의 요리 실력은 정말 장난 아니에요. (His cooking skills are really no joke.)
